statusTrace:
page = <Page url='https://d1lifbniuc73oj.cloudfront.net/'>

    def test_verify_quick_tasks(page: Page):
    
        # ==========================================================
        # Test Data
        # ==========================================================
    
        base_url = "https://d1lifbniuc73oj.cloudfront.net/auth/login"
    
        username = "CSASINHN"
        password = "GOLD950"
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 1 : Login
        # ==========================================================
    
        page.goto(base_url)
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="User ID"
        ).fill(username)
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="Password"
        ).fill(password)
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Login"
        ).click()
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_role("main")
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 2 : Open Orders
        # ==========================================================
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "complementary"
        ).get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Orders",
            exact=True
        ).click()
    
        orders_grid = page.get_by_role("grid")
    
        expect(
            orders_grid
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 3 : Open First Order
        # ==========================================================
    
        order_ids = get_order_ids(page)
    
        assert len(order_ids) > 0, (
            "No Orders available."
        )
    
        selected_order = order_ids[0]
    
        orders_grid.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name=selected_order,
            exact=True
        ).click()
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_title(selected_order)
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_text(f"Order #{selected_order}")
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        displayed_order = (
            page.get_by_text(f"Order #{selected_order}")
            .inner_text()
            .replace("Order #", "")
            .strip()
        )
    
        assert displayed_order == selected_order
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 4 : Verify All 13 Quick Tasks
        # ==========================================================
    
        quick_tasks = [
    
            "Invoice",
            "Edit Order",
            "Change Payment",
            "Add Hold",
            "Resolve Holds",
            "Schedule",
            "Release",
            "Cancel Order",
            "Change Order Address",
            "Manage Charges",
            "Change Shipping Details",
            "Add Lines",
            "Create Return"
    
        ]
    
        for task in quick_tasks:
    
            locator = page.get_by_role(
                "button",
                name=task
            )
    
            assert locator.count() >= 1, (
                f"{task} button not found."
            )
    
            expect(
                locator.first
            ).to_be_visible()
    
        assert len(quick_tasks) == 13
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 5 : Verify Edit Order Enabled
        # ==========================================================
    
        edit_order = page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Edit Order"
        ).first
    
        expect(
            edit_order
        ).to_be_enabled()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 6 : Verify Add Hold Enabled
        # ==========================================================
    
        add_hold = page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Add Hold"
        ).first
    
        expect(
            add_hold
        ).to_be_enabled()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 7 : Verify Resolve Holds Initial State
        # ==========================================================
    
        resolve_hold = page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Resolve Holds"
        ).first
    
        # Some orders may already contain holds.
        # If disabled, it satisfies the test.
        # If enabled, continue with the flow.
    
        if resolve_hold.is_disabled():
    
            expect(
                resolve_hold
            ).to_be_disabled()
    
        else:
    
            print(
                "Resolve Holds already enabled for this order."
            )
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 8 : Add Hold
        # ==========================================================
    
        add_hold.click()
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_role(
                "button",
                name="Select hold description"
            )
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Select hold description"
        ).click()
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Tax Expire Hold"
        ).click()
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Add Hold"
        ).nth(1).click()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 9 : Verify Resolve Holds Enabled
        # ==========================================================
    
        expect(
            resolve_hold
        ).to_be_enabled()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 10 : Resolve Hold
        # ==========================================================
    
        page.get_by_title(selected_order).click()
    
        page.get_by_role("main").get_by_role("button", name="Resolve Holds").click()
    
        created_status = page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Created",
            exact=True
        )
    
        created_status.click()
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Resolved"
        ).click()
    
        apply_button = page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Apply"
        )
    
        expect(
            apply_button
        ).to_be_enabled()
    
        apply_button.click()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 12 : Verify Add Hold Always Enabled
        # ==========================================================
    
        expect(
            add_hold
        ).to_be_enabled()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 13 : Verify Edit Order Still Enabled
        # ==========================================================
    
        expect(
            edit_order
        ).to_be_enabled()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 14 : Verify All Quick Tasks Still Visible
        # ==========================================================
    
        for task in quick_tasks:
    
            locator = page.get_by_role(
                "button",
                name=task
            )
    
            assert locator.count() >= 1, (
                f"{task} button not found after resolving hold."
            )
    
            expect(
                locator.first
            ).to_be_visible()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 15 : Verify Resolve Holds State
        # ==========================================================
    
        # After resolving the hold, the button may become disabled
        # if no active holds remain. If another hold already exists,
        # it may remain enabled.
    
        if resolve_hold.is_enabled():
    
            print(
                "Another active hold exists on this order."
            )
    
        else:
    
            expect(
                resolve_hold
            ).to_be_disabled()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 16 : Final Assertions
        # ==========================================================
    
        assert (
            displayed_order == selected_order
        ), (
            "Opened Order ID does not match selected Order."
        )
    
        assert (
            len(quick_tasks) == 13
        ), (
            "Expected exactly 13 Quick Tasks."
        )
    
        assert (
            add_hold.is_enabled()
        ), (
            "Add Hold should always be enabled."
        )
    
        assert (
            edit_order.is_enabled()
        ), (
            "Edit Order should remain enabled."
        )
    
        for task in quick_tasks:
    
>           assert (
                page.get_by_role(
                    "button",
                    name=task
                ).count() >= 1
            ), (
                f"{task} is missing."
            )
